logo.name: Primary Logo Mark
logo.description: A clean, distinctive brand logo mark (symbol only, no text)
logo.aesthetic: A professional, memorable brand logo mark built around one clear meaningful symbol with a strong silhouette and timeless design
qualities: a clear recognizable symbol that represents the concept
scalable down to a favicon without losing clarity
confident and intentional, not a generic abstract swirl
logo.default_framing: Single centered mark, isolated, generous even margins
default_constraints: No text, letters, or words unless explicitly requested
One cohesive symbol, not a busy scene
Avoid vague abstract swooshes unless explicitly requested

logo-wordmark.name: Logo + Wordmark (Lockup)
logo-wordmark.description: The brand name set as a wordmark, optionally paired with the mark
logo-wordmark.aesthetic: A polished brand lockup pairing a symbol with a cleanly set wordmark of the brand name
qualities: balanced relationship between mark and text
logo-wordmark.default_framing: Horizontal lockup, mark left of the name or name centered under the mark
default_constraints: Spell the brand name EXACTLY as given, no extra or missing letters

monogram.name: Monogram / Lettermark
monogram.description: A one or two letter monogram mark from the brand initials
monogram.aesthetic: An elegant monogram lettermark built from the brand initials with confident geometry
qualities: works inside a badge or bare
default_constraints: Use ONLY the exact initials provided

app-icon.name: App Icon
app-icon.description: A rounded-square app icon built from the brand mark
app-icon.aesthetic: A modern app icon presenting the brand mark on a cohesive branded background
qualities: cohesive background fill or subtle brand gradient
high contrast between mark and background
app-icon.default_framing: Centered mark, rounded-square canvas, consistent safe-area padding
default_constraints: Mark stays inside the safe area

favicon.name: Favicon
favicon.description: An ultra-simplified brand mark that stays legible at 16px
favicon.aesthetic: A radically simplified version of the brand mark tuned for tiny sizes
favicon.default_framing: Centered, fills most of the frame, minimal margin
default_constraints: No thin lines or small details

social-avatar.name: Social Avatar
social-avatar.description: A circular-safe profile avatar built from the brand mark
social-avatar.aesthetic: A profile avatar presenting the brand mark centered for a circular crop
social-avatar.default_framing: Centered within a circular safe area, generous padding from edges
default_constraints: Important content stays within the central circle
No text unless it is the monogram

brand-illustration.name: Brand Illustration
brand-illustration.description: An on-brand spot illustration matching the brand's visual style
brand-illustration.aesthetic: A cohesive brand illustration that matches the established brand style and palette
qualities: consistent line weight and shape language
brand-illustration.default_framing: Centered, balanced composition with clear focal point
default_constraints: Keep the same illustration style across a set

brand-pattern.name: Brand Pattern
brand-pattern.description: A seamless, tileable background pattern derived from brand motifs
brand-pattern.aesthetic: A seamless tileable brand pattern built from simplified brand motifs and colors
qualities: derived from the brand mark or motifs
brand-pattern.default_framing: Edge-to-edge full coverage, no focal point
default_constraints: Low enough contrast to sit behind content

brand-banner.name: Brand Banner
brand-banner.description: A social or hero banner in the brand style with room for text
brand-banner.aesthetic: A wide on-brand banner with dramatic yet clean composition and space for a headline
qualities: clear negative space for a headline
brand-banner.default_framing: Wide composition, focal interest on one side, negative space on the other for text
default_constraints: Leave clear negative space for a headline

brand-photo.name: Brand Photography
brand-photo.description: A photographic image styled to match the brand's look and feel
brand-photo.aesthetic: A professional brand photograph with commercial polish matching the brand mood
qualities: on-brand color grading and lighting mood
brand-photo.default_framing: Natural composition following rule of thirds
default_constraints: Match the brand mood and color grade
Keep styling consistent across a set

brand-icon.name: Brand UI Icon
brand-icon.description: A UI icon drawn in the brand's icon style for a consistent set
brand-icon.aesthetic: A clean UI icon drawn in a single consistent brand icon style
brand-icon.default_framing: Centered, isolated, consistent padding on a square grid
default_constraints: Keep stroke weight identical across the set
